name: prolinker-mobile
description: Capacitor wrapper for the ProLinker web prototype

scripts.add:android: npm run prepare:web && cap add android
scripts.add:ios: npm run prepare:web && cap add ios
scripts.copy:android: npm run prepare:web && cap copy android
scripts.copy:ios: npm run prepare:web && cap copy ios
scripts.assets: npm run assets:android && npm run assets:ios
scripts.sync:android: npm run prepare:web && cap sync android
scripts.sync:ios: npm run prepare:web && cap sync ios
